revision.comment: 新しいカテゴリテンプレ：旧国名別式内社（旧国名別人物を参考にして）。設置理由は[[Category‐ノート:式内社#サブカテゴリ作成・参考地除去の提案]]を参照。
revision.text:
このカテゴリ「'''{{PAGENAME}}'''」は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「[[延喜式神名帳|神名帳]]上下」に記載のある神社、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[延喜式神名帳#論社|論社]]のうち、[[{{{1}}}]]にある神社をまとめたカテゴリ。 名神大社は「名」、式内大社は「大」、式内小社は読み順で記載。

[[:Category:Shikinaisha in Chikuzen Province|Chikuzen]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Chikugo Province|Chikugo]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Buzen Province|Buzen]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Bungo Province|Bungo]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Hizen Province|Hizen]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Higo Province|Higo]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Hyūga Province|Hyūga]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Satsuma Province|Satsuma]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Iki Island|Iki]] | [[:Category:Shikinaisha in Tsushima|Tsushima]] |} {{-}} ==Scope of this category== Among the {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} listed in Volumes 9 and 10 of the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式}}, in the “upper” and “lower” parts of the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt=Jinmyōchō|lt_ja=神名帳}}, this category covers the shrines located in '''{{{1}}}''' (reference sites are not included). * See [[List of Shikinaisha in {{{1}}}]] for a comprehensive list including Ronsha * {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社}} are marked “名”; Shikinaisha of Taisha rank (excluding Myōjin Taisha) are marked “大”; Shikinaisha of Shōsha rank are listed in kana (reading) order. {{座標一覧}}
{{citation needed|しきないしやきゆうこくめいへつ}} [[ja:Template:旧国名別式内社カテゴリ]] {{translated page|ja|Template:旧国名別式内社カテゴリ|version=103357572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{wikidata link|Q18987565}} [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[Category:式内社関連テンプレート|*きゆうこくめいへつ]] [[Category:日本の地域テンプレート]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
